Metadata.title: Davetiye — Digital Wedding Invitation Platform
Metadata.description: Modern, elegant and fully customizable digital wedding invitations. RSVP, memory book, QR codes and much more.

Hero.subtitle: Modern, elegant and fully customizable digital wedding invitations. RSVP, memory book, QR codes and much more.
Hero.tagline:
Design your dream wedding
on a single platform.
Hero.registerSubtitle: Leave your details and we'll call you.
Hero.registerSuccessMsg: We'll contact you as soon as possible.

Features.label: FEATURES
Features.subtitle: From invitations to guest management, memory book to instant sharing — all your wedding's digital needs under one roof.
Features.rsvpDesc: Track your guests' attendance in real-time with automatic reminders.
Features.goldDesc: Collect special messages and memories from your guests. Unforgettable keepsakes from your wedding.
Features.qrDesc: Bridge your physical invitation to the digital world with a QR code.
Features.guestDesc: Guest lists, seating plans, instant notifications and detailed reports.
Features.shareDesc: Share with all your loved ones via WhatsApp, SMS and social media in one click.
Features.langDesc: Turkish, English and German invitation support. Ideal for your international guests.

Mission.paragraph1: We thought of every detail. We bring couples' dreams into the digital world. From invitations to guest management, from memory book to instant sharing, everything in one platform.
Mission.paragraph2: Not just an invitation, but the digital face of your wedding. A modern, elegant experience crafted entirely for you.

HowItWorks.label: HOW IT WORKS
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Browse our inspiring professional designs and pick your favorite.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Add names, date, location, music and all the details.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Send instantly via WhatsApp, QR code or direct link.

Pricing.label: PRICING
Pricing.heading: Choose the plan that fits you

starter.name: Starter
starter.desc: Get started with a digital invitation and wedding website.
starter.features: Wedding Website,Digital Invitation,Online RSVP Form,Location & Directions,Countdown Timer,WhatsApp Sharing

pro.name: Pro
pro.desc: Complete experience with photos, memories and personalization.
pro.features: Photo Upload & Gallery,Memory Book (Guest Messages),Background Music,Your Story Section,Multi-Language (TR/EN/DE),Reminder Notifications,Everything in Starter

business.name: Business
business.desc: Digital + physical, printed invitations with QR table stickers.
business.features: Printed Real Invitation (100*),QR Code Stickers (25*),Custom Design Support,Priority Support,Custom Domain,Everything in Pro

CTA.subtitle: Start your digital wedding experience today with the platform trusted by thousands of couples.

Wizard.heading: Create Your Dream Invitation
Wizard.subtitle: Verify your identity and share the details to continue.
Wizard.step3Desc: Choose the best fit for you
Wizard.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
Wizard.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up

Wizard.doneText: Now it's time to customize your invitation and explore our designs made just for you.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.intro: At Uygun Davet, we care about protecting your personal data. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.
PrivacyPage.s1Text: When using our services, we may collect: your name, email address, phone number, wedding details (date, venue, family information), and social media account information (if you sign in with Google/Facebook).
PrivacyPage.s2Text: The data we collect is used solely for providing digital invitation services, customer communication, account management, and improving service quality. Your data is never shared with third parties for marketing purposes.
PrivacyPage.s3Text: Your data is protected with SSL encryption and stored on secure servers. Passwords are hashed using the bcrypt algorithm and cannot be viewed by any staff member.
PrivacyPage.s4Text: Our website uses essential cookies for session management. These cookies are necessary for the service to function properly.
PrivacyPage.s5Text: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your data. You can use our contact form or reach out to us directly to submit your requests.
PrivacyPage.s6Text: For questions about our privacy policy, please reach out through our contact form.

TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.intro: By using Uygun Davet services, you agree to the following terms.
TermsPage.s1Text: Uygun Davet is a platform that provides digital wedding invitation creation, guest management, RSVP tracking, and related digital services.
TermsPage.s2Text: You are responsible for the security of your account. You must not share your password and acknowledge that you are responsible for all activity on your account.
TermsPage.s3Text: Package purchases are one-time payments. No refunds after service delivery. You may request cancellation within 14 days for packages that have not been activated.
TermsPage.s4Text: You are fully responsible for photos, text, and other content you upload to your invitations. You agree not to upload illegal, copyrighted, or inappropriate content.
TermsPage.s5Text: Uygun Davet reserves the right to modify its services and pricing with prior notice. Your existing package remains valid under the conditions at the time of purchase.
TermsPage.s6Text: Disputes arising from these terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Turkey, and Istanbul courts have jurisdiction.

DataDeletionPage.title: Data Deletion
DataDeletionPage.intro: You can request the deletion of all your personal data associated with your Uygun Davet account.
DataDeletionPage.s1Text: To request data deletion, please contact us through our contact form with the email address associated with your account. We will process your request within 30 days.
DataDeletionPage.s2Text: Upon request, we will permanently delete: your account information, wedding details, guest lists, uploaded photos, and all associated data. This action is irreversible.
DataDeletionPage.s3Text: Some data may be retained for legal obligations (invoices, tax records) for the period required by law, even after account deletion.
